---
title: "eda"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(ggthemes)

data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")


df <- data %>% 
  filter(age >= 18,
         esr != "Not in Labor Force"
         ) %>% 
  select(race_simp,
         income_personal,
         education,
         cit) %>% 
  mutate(income_brackets = case_when(income_personal <= 15000 ~ "0-15k",
                                     income_personal <= 30000 ~ "15k-30k",
                                     income_personal <= 60000 ~ "30k-60k",
                                     income_personal <= 90000 ~ "60k-90k",
                                     income_personal <= 120000 ~ "90k-120k",
                                     income_personal <= 150000 ~ "120k-150k",
                                     income_personal > 150000 ~ "150k+"),
         cit_simp = ifelse(cit != "Not a U.S. citizen",
                                 "Citizen",
                                 "Non-Citizen"),
         cit_simp = factor(cit_simp,
                           levels = c("Non-Citizen",
                                      "Citizen")))
```

```{r}
cit_income_barchart <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(cit_simp), !is.na(income_brackets)) %>%
  group_by(income_brackets, cit_simp) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cit_simp) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n),
         income_brackets = factor(income_brackets,
                                  levels = c("0-15k", "15k-30k", "30k-60k",
                                             "60k-90k", "90k-120k", "120k-150k",
                                             "150k+"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = income_brackets, y = prop, fill = cit_simp)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Citizen" = "#377eb8", "Non-Citizen" = "#e41a1c")) +
  labs(
    title = "Plot 5: Non-Citizens Make Less Money Than Citizens",
    x     = "",
    y     = "",
    fill  = ""
  ) +
  theme_few()

ggsave("../../statistical_report/cit_inc_barchart.png",
       cit_income_barchart,
       width = 10, 
       height = 6, 
       dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
# Build combined dataframe with a category label
combined_freq <- bind_rows(
  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(race_simp)) %>%
    group_by(label = race_simp) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(prop = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
           group = "Race"),
  
  data %>%
    filter(!is.na(education)) %>%
    group_by(label = as.character(education)) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(prop = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
           label = factor(label,
                          levels = c("Post-bacc professional degree",
                                     "Doctorate degree",
                                     "Master's degree",
                                     "Bachelor's degree",
                                     "Associate's degree",
                                     "Some college",
                                     "Regular high school diploma",
                                     "GED or alternative credential",
                                     "Less than High School",
                                     "No schooling completed")),
           group = "Education") %>%
    arrange(label) %>%
    mutate(label = as.character(label)),
  
  data %>%
    filter(!is.na(cit_simp)) %>%
    group_by(label = as.character(cit_simp)) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(prop = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
           group = "Citizenship"),
  
  data %>%
    filter(!is.na(income_brackets)) %>%
    group_by(label = income_brackets) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(prop = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
           label = factor(label,
                          levels = c("0-15k", "15k-30k", "30k-60k",
                                     "60k-90k", "90k-120k", "120k-150k",
                                     "150k+")),
           group = "Income Bracket") %>%
    arrange(label) %>%
    mutate(label = as.character(label))
)

combined_freq_table <- combined_freq %>%
  dplyr::select(group, label, n, prop) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "label", groupname_col = "group") %>%
  tab_header(title = "Table S1: Variable Frequencies") %>%
  tab_stubhead(label = "Category") %>%
  cols_label(
    n    = "n",
    prop = "%"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = n, decimals = 0) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(paste0("Total n = ", scales::comma(nrow(data))))

combined_freq_table

gtsave(combined_freq_table, "../../statistical_report/table_s1_variable_frequencies.png")
```

```{r}
showing_data <- data %>% 
  mutate(income_brackets = case_when(income_personal <= 15000 ~ "0-15k",
                                     income_personal <= 30000 ~ "15k-30k",
                                     income_personal <= 60000 ~ "30k-60k",
                                     income_personal <= 90000 ~ "60k-90k",
                                     income_personal <= 120000 ~ "90k-120k",
                                     income_personal <= 150000 ~ "120k-150k",
                                     income_personal > 150000 ~ "150k+"),
         cit_simp = ifelse(cit != "Not a U.S. citizen",
                                 "Citizen",
                                 "Non-Citizen"),
         cit_simp = factor(cit_simp,
                           levels = c("Non-Citizen",
                                      "Citizen"))) %>% 
  filter(age >= 18,
         esr != "Not in Labor Force") %>% 
  select(age, income_personal, income_brackets, race_simp, education, cit_simp)


glimpse(showing_data)
```

```{r}
showing_table <- showing_data %>%
  slice_sample(n = 5) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    income_personal  = "Income ($)",
    income_brackets  = "Income Bracket",
    race_simp        = "Race",
    education        = "Education",
    cit_simp         = "Citizenship"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns  = income_personal,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = "Table 1: Sample of Analysis Data",
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = "Total dataset: 52,136 observations. Filtered to ages 18+ in the labor force."
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#f5f5f5"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, 5, by = 2))
  )
```

```{r}
gtsave(showing_table, "../../statistical_report/sample_data.png")
```
